checkpoints.summary: Implemented domain models for ExamBuilder, Question, and Competency. Wrote 10 tests covering question creation, competency tagging, nugget multiplier validation. All 10 tests passing. 6 tests skipped (placeholders for later tasks).

Implemented Schedule domain model with exam date windowing and per-attempt time limit. Created DTO, ORM, repository, infra, API router, and service layers. Wrote 12 tests across domain/service/API layers. All 12 tests passing.
Built complete frontend for Gamified Competency Assessment Platform with 11 pages, types matching backend DTOs, and API service layer. Build succeeds. Tests status below.
